{{Quote|Have you a message for me, Aunt Alema? Wisdom from the Nightlands?''"</br>"''Don't let her see you, nephew. Don't let her remember.|Alema's nephew and their spirit, on the Nightlander|<ref name="TftN 1" />}}
'''Alema''' was a [[Gender|female]] [[Twi'lek]] who [[Death|died]] at some point during the [[Republic Era]].<ref name="TftN 1" /> Between [[32 BBY]] and [[22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''Tales From the Nightlands'' 1 take place during the time [[Anakin Skywalker]] is the [[Padawan]] of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]], which corresponds to between [[32 BBY]] and [[22 BBY]] per ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''.</ref> the Twi'lek [[Daesha]] did a ritual which woken up many spirits including Alema.<ref name="TftN 1" />
